title: elaeagnaceae
intro: The Elaeagnaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. This family, also known as the silverberry or Russian olive family, comprises around 70 to 85 species of deciduous or evergreen shrubs and small trees native to Asia and North America. Elaeagnaceae plants are typically characterized by their silver or gray foliage, showy flowers, and edible fruit. They are also known for their ability to form symbiotic relationships with nitrogen-fixing bacteria, allowing them to thrive in poor soil conditions.
